infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Field Command uses your location to verify you are on the job site when clocking in and out.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Field Command uses your location to verify you are on the job site.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Field Command uses the camera to capture job site photos for daily production reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Field Command accesses your photo library to attach job site photos to daily production reports.
